source.title: 41 Universities Selected for 'Advanced Bootcamp' to Foster AI, Future Vehicle, and Robotics Talent
source.snippet: Ministry of Education and KIAT selected 41 universities for 2026 Advanced Industry Talent Bootcamp. AI sector selected by region with 30 outside Seoul metro.

rejection_reason: duplicate-adjacent: bootcamp selection already covered by hannam-bootcamp and seoul-ai-bootcamp
